hero.title: Full Stack Engineer
hero.tagline: Applied AI and full stack systems in production — from Java/Python backends to Angular/React frontends.

about.title: About Me
about.name: Wesley de Carvalho Augusto Correia
bio: Full cycle Full Stack engineer: I work from proposal and architecture to deployment and production monitoring. Today I split my time between AutoU — an applied-AI startup, working on projects for enterprise clients — and my own freelance operation, with production systems I sold, designed, built and operate myself. Backend in Java/Spring Boot and Python/FastAPI; frontend in Angular and React.

My focus is software that moves a business number. At AutoU, I rebuilt the pipeline that replicates savings projects across Saint-Gobain plants — a program whose recommendations already total ~R$ 13–15 million — and I lead technical fronts in computer vision (YOLO + LLMs) for 24/7 monitoring of gas stations and in chemical R&D with Bayesian optimization. As a freelancer, I keep systems in production ranging from invoice (NF-e) automation and an AI-powered omnichannel support center to the management system of a food business handling ~R$ 300k/month in sales. Before that, I took part in the modernization of Selic (COBOL → Java) at ANBIMA/Brazilian Central Bank, where I implemented the project's observability stack (Prometheus/Grafana).

Bachelor of Law and Computer Science undergraduate — a combination that makes me comfortable in domains where the complexity lives in the business rules, not just the code. I look for automation, integration and applied-AI problems where you can measure the before and after.

experience.title: Experience
experience.value: Full Stack Engineer with 6+ years in tech: today at AutoU (applied AI for enterprise clients) and running my own freelance operation with systems in production. Before that, Selic modernization (COBOL → Java) at ANBIMA/Central Bank, IT governance and automation.

education.title: Education
education.value: Bachelor of Law. Postgraduate in Full Stack Java Development (completed Feb/2026), MBA in Project Management (in progress) and Computer Science (in progress).

projects.title: Projects
projects.value: FullStack development with Clean Architecture, SOLID, DDD and best practices (OWASP, ACID). System Automation and Modernization.

highlights.title: Savings replication pipeline (Saint-Gobain)
highlights.text: rebuilt the pipeline that replicates savings projects across Saint-Gobain plants: previously manual spreadsheet integrations became an API, running as Cloud Run Jobs + Scheduler with hash-based idempotent sync, auditing and rollback — recommendations that already total ~R$ 13–15 million in savings.

highlights.title: 24/7 computer vision in production
highlights.text: I lead the compliance-monitoring front for a fuel-station chain with YOLO at the edge integrated with LLMs via google-genai, LangGraph and RAG, plus a retraining loop fed by user feedback — a 2-station pilot scaling toward the chain's ~50 stations.

highlights.title: Demand forecasting and inventory optimization
highlights.text: Prophet algorithms for demand forecasting and daily purchase, inter-branch transfer and substitute-product recommendations, integrated with the Sankhya ERP — automated daily runs in production.

highlights.title: Chemical R&D with Bayesian optimization
highlights.text: modernized a previously manual R&D process (trial-and-error greenhouse cycles) into a workflow assisted by generative AI (Gemini via google-genai) — the Colibri agent — with next-formulation-to-test suggestions via BayBE (Merck's open-source framework) — fewer physical greenhouse cycles, in production for a chemical manufacturer.

highlights.title: AI cost observability (Prometheus/Grafana)
highlights.text: implemented the production observability stack on my own initiative — Prometheus + Grafana on a stateful VM — monitoring AI cost, usage and infrastructure across the computer vision and R&D projects.

highlights.title: Intelligent catalog: PDF ingestion and semantic search
highlights.text: took part in founding a catalog platform — PDF catalog extraction with Gemini Vision, confidence scoring with human curation, and pgvector for semantic search — in production.

exp7.position: Full Stack Engineer — full cycle (own products & direct clients)

highlights.title: AOG Dux Truck — emergency logistics (in production)
highlights.text: AOG (aircraft on ground) operations system built solo in Java 21 + Spring Boot 3 (Clean Architecture), Angular 20 and Microsoft Entra ID; each demand has its own tracking screen with chat and a traceable event timeline, cutting email and phone follow-ups.

highlights.title: NF-e tax automation (in production)
highlights.text: invoice capture from email via Microsoft Graph with layered extraction (deterministic XML → PDF → OCR/AI only as fallback) in FastAPI + React, eliminating manual data entry: 20–100 invoices per day, thousands already processed.

highlights.title: Sol — omnichannel service desk with AI (in production)
highlights.text: support via WhatsApp, Teams, web and email in a single hub — around 20–50 tickets/day — with an AI satisfaction thermometer, ticket management and an integrated CRM; FastAPI + Angular 20 + pgvector + Gemini + Evolution/Meta API.

highlights.title: Soneca — snack-bar management in production
highlights.text: full management in production handling ~R$ 300k/month in sales: counter, table ordering via QR code, self-service kiosk and cross-platform ESC/POS printing; own delivery ecosystem in Java 17 + Angular 20+ (PWAs, real-time GPS tracking), currently deactivated.

highlights.title: Mercearia R&V — offline-first retail (in production)
highlights.text: desktop inventory/sales/POS system with Electron orchestrating embedded Spring Boot + PostgreSQL in a single NSIS installer — daily use in the client's operation with zero recurring cost.

highlights.title: Qualtrics CX dashboard and other deliveries
highlights.text: customer-experience dashboard (FastAPI + Angular + Gemini) with a TypeScript MCP server for the Qualtrics API; plus a logistics workflow platform replacing a corporate BPM (in homologation) and an EDI frontend refactor in Next.js 16 + React 19 + Tailwind 4.

highlights.title: Novo-Selic modernization (mainframe → Java)
highlights.text: worked on migrating a critical national financial-infrastructure system from mainframe COBOL to a Java 17 + Spring Boot 3.x + Angular architecture, with Oracle Database persistence.

highlights.title: End-to-end observability
highlights.text: implemented a full observability stack (Prometheus, Grafana, Spring Actuator, Micrometer, Blackbox Exporter, AlertManager), enabling metrics, healthchecks and SLA monitoring in a mission-critical environment.

highlights.title: Containerization and CI/CD on GitLab
highlights.text: containerized applications with Docker and structured CI/CD pipelines on GitLab, automating build, tests and deploy with strict branch versioning.

highlights.title: Oracle schema versioning
highlights.text: versioned Oracle schemas with Liquibase and SQL scripts, ensuring traceability and controlled rollback on a sensitive transactional database.

highlights.title: SharePoint and Power BI for C-level
highlights.text: built SharePoint webparts (JavaScript, HTML, CSS) integrated via SharePoint API and Power BI (DAX) dashboards for executive indicators, serving C-level demands (Central Bank and ANBIMA).

highlights.title: Management frameworks aligned with PDTIC
highlights.text: applied PMI, Agile, MPS.BR and CMMI frameworks on initiatives aligned with the PDTIC, standardizing processes and sustaining IT governance deliveries.

highlights.title: RPA architecture for Brazilian courts
highlights.text: built an RPA architecture with Python, VBA and Selenium for large-scale data extraction from Brazilian courts, integrating internal systems with judicial platforms and significantly reducing case-registration time.

highlights.title: Procedural diligence and judicial financials
highlights.text: structured the management of diligences, judicial deposits and court fees through automation, raising data integrity and the accuracy of the firm's operational indicators.

highlights.title: Commercial KPI automation
highlights.text: automated data collection, report generation and commercial KPI analysis with VBA/Excel and Salesforce, reducing the time spent on administrative routines.

highlights.title: SAP operation and operational management
highlights.text: worked with SAP and Excel for operational management, quality control and customer-service support — first exposure to a corporate ERP.

edu1.description: Postgraduate program focused on Full Stack Java development with emphasis on Spring and modern development practices.

edu2.description: Postgraduate in project management with a focus on Agile practices and PMI.

edu3.description: Bachelor's degree in progress in Computer Science.
